goal: Find row-level treatment-effect pilot/full-scale analytic dataset or supplement.

goal: Find extraction workbooks for childhood obesity, adult obesity, and broader health-behavior RGB datasets.
blocker_to_resolve: Article/preprint pages confirm pair/effect counts, but no public master D/N workbook was mirrored.

goal: Recover Shiny/Google-Sheets backing dataset or archived export.

goal: Research whether one-arm ORR/proportion rows can be converted under a defensible rule, and what minimum source fields are needed.
